case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC VS. ROBERT BANAYAT

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BANAYAT, ROBERT SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-30-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-29-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-15-2013
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-03-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BANAYAT, ROBERT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $515.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BANAYAT, ROBERT
DECLARATION OF COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 1033 (B)(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC SERVED SEP-10-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BANAYAT, ROBERT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-30-2013 CONTINUED TO APR-03-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANAYAT, ROBERT $32,565.37 PRINCIPAL, $3,301.90 INTEREST, $515.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $36,382.27, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP SEC 395(B); VENUE FOR PERSONAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
